dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7043 IH: To amend the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to reauthorize the transmission facilitation program.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Pappas (for himself and Mr. Moylan) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to reauthorize the transmission facilitation program.

section.text: Section 40106(d)(3) of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (42 U.S.C. 18713(d)(3)) is amended by striking 2022 through 2026 and inserting 2026 through 2031.
